title: AI Automation Intern

Job description

The Opportunity
We’re looking for a passionate AI Automation Intern to join our growing team and support the design, implementation, and management of AI-powered tools, workflows, and content strategies. This role is ideal for someone curious about the future of tech, capital, and global impact—and eager to get hands-on experience in real-world applications of AI across marketing, investor relations, events, and automation.

Responsibilities

Research and prototype AI automation workflows using our team access to anti-gravity, Gemini Ultra, Claude code.

Assist in engineering full-stack solutions for our global investor relations network. 

Help structure AI-powered CRM, lead generation, and follow-up systems

Analyze and summarize transcripts, pitch decks, and meeting notes using AI tools

Support live event production with AI-based transcription, insight generation, or chatbot support

Contribute to digital campaign strategy, including video scripting, social assets, and knowledge bases

Explore and document emerging AI tools for use in investor outreach, marketing, or backend operations

Who You Are

Curious about AI, Web3, and the future of innovation

Skilled with understanding various languages of code. ChatGPT, Claude, or other LLMs—or eager to master them quickly

Experience with Notion, vibe coding, a plus.

Excellent communicator with strong writing and organization skills

Fast learner with a builder’s mindset; comfortable in agile startup environments

Bonus: Interested in capital markets, sustainability, investor relations, or venture events

What You'll Gain

Direct experience working with real AI projects in a fast-paced strategic advisory studio

Exposure to investor events, impact-driven founders, and deal ecosystems

Mentorship from Future House leadership on innovation, capital strategy, and tech trends

Portfolio-building opportunities with published content, campaigns, and automations

Letter of recommendation or future contract work for high-performing interns

The internship is unpaid but will lead to a job if we work well together.
